summary: Iteration 12: Verified datetime.time serialization bug fix for Excel xlsx files. All 5 pipeline records now upload successfully (previously only 1 due to BSON serialization error). clean_value() correctly handles datetime.time objects from Excel schedule_time columns. Date formatting displays as DD-Mon-YYYY instead of ISO timestamps.

backend: GET /api/status: naukri_count=5, pipeline_count=5, registered_count=5 (BUG FIX VERIFIED)
GET /api/dashboard-counts: registered=5, shortlisted=5, scheduled=4, not_scheduled=1, attended=0, not_attended=4, rejected=0
GET /api/debug/matching: 5 matched, 0 unmatched (all 5 employees matched by email AND phone)
GET /api/job-roles: returns 1 role 'AI & ML Engineer - C++ / Java Developer' with count=5
Applicant statuses: Rishi=Not Attended, Gautham=Not Attended, Madhumithaa=Not Attended, Harshini=Not Attended, Jona=Shortlisted
GET /api/summary: 1 role with total=5, shortlisted=5, scheduled=4, not_scheduled=1, attended=0, not_attended=4
Date format verification: DD-Mon-YYYY (e.g., '05-Aug-2004', '24-Mar-2026') - NOT ISO timestamps
frontend: Login page loads with form elements
Dashboard shows DB Status: Naukri=5, Pipeline=5, Registered=5
Roles page shows 1 role card 'AI & ML Engineer - C++ / Java Developer' with count=5
Role drilldown page shows all 5 applicants with correct data
Status badges display correctly: Not Attended (orange), Shortlisted (amber)
Date values display in DD-Mon-YYYY format (e.g., '05-Aug-2004', '24-Mar-2026')

bug_fix_verification.issue: datetime.time serialization error in schedule_time column from Excel xlsx files
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: clean_value() did not handle datetime.time objects, causing MongoDB BSON serialization to fail for 4/5 pipeline rows
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: clean_value() now handles datetime.time objects using val.strftime('%I:%M %p') format
bug_fix_verification.date_formatting_improvement: Midnight timestamps (date-only values) now display as DD-Mon-YYYY instead of full ISO format

seed_data_creation: Real user data from xlsx files: 5 Naukri records + 5 Pipeline records. All 5 employees have matching email AND phone. 4 have schedule_date/time (Not Attended), 1 (Jona) has no schedule (Shortlisted).
context_for_next_testing_agent: BUG FIX VERIFIED: clean_value() in server.py now handles datetime.time objects from Excel schedule_time columns. Previously MongoDB BSON serialization failed for 4/5 pipeline rows. All 5 records now upload and display correctly. Date formatting improved: midnight timestamps display as DD-Mon-YYYY instead of ISO. Job role contains special characters (& + /) which are properly URL-encoded in frontend navigation.
